summary: V9.0 REBRANDING VALIDATION — Frontend-only sweep on live preview (https://github-push-test.preview.emergentagent.com). All requested features PASS. (1) Landing page: EPD brand cube 'EP' logo + 'Energy Project Design' (with gradient 'Design'), italic violet 'Redesigning projects.' tagline, hero deep-navy with cover image, hero-cta-gas button 'Începe proiect gaze naturale' visible+clickable, stats 33/221/13/eIDAS all present, 'THE ARCHITECTS OF FUTURE GLOBAL TECHNOLOGY' subtagline rendered. PRODUS PRINCIPAL · OPERAȚIONAL 100% section renders Gaze featured BEFORE the 14-services grid; main-product-cta + main-product-pricing visible. (2) Services grid: all 7 required testids present (landing-service-{gas|electric|marketplace|realestate|logistics|industry|verify}); gas card has 'Produs principal' badge + violet ring+gradient styling. (3) Roadmap: 23 roadmap-* test ids (22 future services + 1 roadmap-vision banner) ✓. Footer CUI 43151074 present. (4) Login: brand panel left side with login-brand-name, login-brand-tagline 'Redesigning projects.' headline, EP cube logo, '33 DOCS LEGALE / 221 CÂMPURI / 13 INDUSTRII' stat blocks; credentials dragosserban95@gmail.com / Test12345 → redirect to /dashboard succeeds. (5) AppShell sidebar (data-testid=app-sidebar) on /dashboard: 'EP' cube logo + 'Energy Project Design' (with gradient 'Design') + 'Redesigning projects.' sub-text ✓. (6) /acasa (HomePageV7): home-hero deep-navy with 'Bine ai venit. Redesigning projects.' visible, home-main-product card 'Studio Gaze Naturale · 33 documente legale' featured ÎNAINTE de quick-access + ecosystems ✓. (7) /comert-logistica: hero renders, all 8 sub-services (Transport materiale, Depozite, Alerte SEAP, Comenzi B2B en-gros, Tracking GPS, Logistică multi-șantier, Prețuri dinamice, Avize transport ADR) present, comert-cta-gas 'Deschide Studio Gaze' visible ✓. (8) /fabrici-uzine: hero 'Proiectare instalații gaz pentru fabrici și uzine.' renders, all 8 specialties (Stații SRM, Instalații tehnologice, SCADA, Certificări ISCIR, Documentație ATEX, Mentenanță preventivă, Consumuri energetice, Proiecte la cheie) present, fabrici-cta-gas visible ✓. (9) Studio Gaze demo PID gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 loads as 'Demo End-to-End — Branșament Aurel Vlaicu 15 (V9.0)', status=signed, 4 tabs visible (DATE OPERAȚIONALE / AVIZE HUB / REGISTRU CÂMPURI (221) / INGINERIE (Renouard + sizing)), 95+ inputs rendered on DATE tab without crash ✓. (10) Regression: /pricing, /proiecte, /forum, /marketplace all render with 0 critical console errors.
action_items: No blockers — V9.0 rebranding is production-ready. Owner can list product on Google.
(Carry-over from iter 12, cosmetic) Nested <button> hydration warning in GasNaturalProjectV2.jsx header — still present, pure DOM warning, does not affect rendering.

(Carry-over from iter 12) Extend SMART_TRIGGERS in /app/frontend/src/components/RegistryFieldsTab.jsx to cover additional validated fields (sudor_cnp, beneficiar_cnp, la_sapatura_adancime_cm, sf_presiune_max_op_bar, pt_calcul_pierderi_presiune_bar).
(Carry-over from iter 12) Refactor opportunity: GasEngineeringPanel.jsx (292 LOC) can be split into 3 subcomponents.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/lib/brand.js — clean single-source-of-truth module, good. Consider exporting a memoised LogoCube component (used inline 5+ times across Landing/Login/AppShell/HomePageV7) to DRY-up the gradient SVG markup.

Landing.jsx (~422 LOC) and HomePageV7.jsx are approaching the 500-line readability threshold; consider extracting ACTIVE_SERVICES / ROADMAP arrays to /lib/services.js or /lib/roadmap.js so brand and content are decoupled.
ComertLogistica.jsx & FabriciUzine.jsx are nearly identical structurally — could be a single <SectorPage data={{...}}> shared component to avoid drift.

401 console errors observed on / and /login pages from a background /api/me check while unauthenticated — expected (probing session) but spam the console. Consider silencing the toast/log for 401-on-anonymous in api.js for cosmetic cleanliness.

success_rate.backend: N/A (skipped per request — V8.7 96+ tests already validated in iter 5-12)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — 50/50 assertions pass across Landing / Login / Dashboard / AppShell sidebar / Acasa / Comert-Logistica / Fabrici-Uzine / Studio Gaze demo + 4 regression pages

test_credentials: Admin/Developer: dragosserban95@gmail.com / Test12345. Demo PID gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4. Live preview: https://github-push-test.preview.emergentagent.com (from /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL).
seed_data_creation: None — read-only verification on existing demo project (already enriched by /app/backend/seed_demo_gas_project.py in a prior session).
context_for_next_testing_agent: V9.0 REBRANDING is locked in. Critical selectors to remember: brand-link, hero-cta-gas, hero-cta-pricing, main-product-cta, main-product-pricing, landing-service-{gas|electric|apa-canal|fotovoltaice|telecom|marketplace|realestate|jobs|forum|crafts|logistics|industry|verify|fees} (14 ids), roadmap-{0..21} + roadmap-vision (23 testids), login-brand-link, login-brand-name, login-brand-tagline, email-input, password-input, login-submit, google-login-btn, app-sidebar, user-name, logout-btn, home-hero, home-main-product, home-quick-access, home-stats, home-ecosystems, comert-cta-gas, fabrici-cta-gas. /comert-logistica and /fabrici-uzine are new routes (App.js). brand.js is the single source for colors+gradients+assets — touch this first when changing palette. Studio at /gaze-naturale/gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 still uses GasNaturalProjectV2.jsx (4 tabs: Date Operaționale / AVIZE HUB / REGISTRU CÂMPURI (221) / INGINERIE).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in V9.0 rebranding delta. Site looks professional, brand-consistent, ready for Google listing per owner request.
